resposta:
solution:
```
class Solution:
    def findIntegers(self, n: int) -> int:
        a, b = 1, 1
        x = 1
        while x <= n:
            a, b = b, a + b
            x *= 2
        return a
```
efficiency: HIGH
time complexity: O(log n)
space complexity: O(1)
energy implications: LOW
explanation: This solution uses dynamic programming to efficiently calculate the number of integers in the range [0, n] whose binary representations do not contain consecutive ones.
